title: pigea serrata
intro: Pigea serrata is also known as Wedelia or Sphagneticola trilobata, a tropical plant species native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory and gastrointestinal issues, and is known to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Pigea serrata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
